Bug / Task Description: The 'timestamp recent' validation rejects a record whose age is exactly the configured limit. A record aged precisely the allowed duration (for example exactly 60s under a 60s limit) is treated as too old and fails validation, when it should still be considered recent; only records strictly older than the limit should fail. Fix the age comparison so a record exactly at the boundary passes.
Commit Subject: fix(validate2): a record exactly at the age limit is still recent
